prompt:
Ultra-realistic full-body fashion editorial photograph of a beautiful young woman with the same facial identity and appearance as the reference. She is standing beside a sleek limestone column in an upscale financial district after sunset, projecting a graceful blend of confidence and charm. She wears modern black square-frame sunglasses and glances toward the illuminated cityscape with a relaxed, fashionable attitude.
Hair:
Long, dense raven-black hair with a luxurious silky texture and healthy shine, styled in a polished Korean salon blowout. Soft face-framing layers flow into loose voluminous waves, creating natural movement as a light evening breeze passes through. Individual strands catch the surrounding city lights, producing subtle glossy highlights and an elegant feminine silhouette.
Makeup:
Refined Korean beauty-inspired makeup with luminous glass-like skin, smooth youthful complexion, delicate facial contours, soft rosy-peach blush, subtle sculpting, natural radiance on the high points of the face, warm taupe eyeshadow, fine eyeliner, feathery curled lashes, softly defined brows, and glossy rose-beige lips. Bright expressive eyes and a gentle smile create a friendly yet sophisticated mood.
Outfit:
Oversized premium charcoal-grey knit sweater featuring large artistic monochrome brushstroke graphics and abstract street-art elements across the front. Rich textured knit fabric, relaxed fit, dropped shoulders, and contemporary luxury streetwear styling. Paired with a high-waisted faded blue denim A-line mini skirt with subtle distressed detailing and clean tailoring. Classic black-and-white skate-inspired sneakers complete the look. A large black cotton tote bag rests naturally on one shoulder. Minimal jewelry for a clean editorial appearance.
Pose:
Relaxed fashion-model stance beside the column, one shoulder lightly touching the structure. One hand casually holding the tote strap while the other rests near the hem of the sweater. Weight shifted naturally onto one leg, creating an effortless silhouette. Head slightly turned, conveying calm confidence and modern city-girl energy.
Environment:
Exclusive downtown business district at night, surrounded by glass towers, illuminated office buildings, elegant architectural details, polished stone walkways, subtle reflections on the pavement, distant vehicle lights, and soft metropolitan bokeh. Clean luxury urban setting with a cinematic atmosphere and premium fashion-campaign feel.
Lighting:
Professional nighttime editorial lighting combining warm architectural uplighting with cool city illumination. Soft directional highlights accentuate facial features and hair texture while preserving realistic shadows. Rich contrast, atmospheric depth, and a sophisticated luxury-magazine aesthetic.
Photography:
Shot on an 85mm portrait lens, full-body vertical composition, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin detail, realistic hair strands, highly detailed knit and denim
